CVE-2025-46205.title: A heap-use-after free in the PdfTokenizer::ReadDictionary functio ...
CVE-2025-46205.description: A heap-use-after free in the PdfTokenizer::ReadDictionary function of podofo v0.10.0 to v0.10.5 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) by supplying a crafted PDF file. NOTE: this is disputed by the Supplier because there is no available file to reproduce the issue.
